summary: Completed testing of subjects dropdown issue in teacher registration form. Backend APIs are working correctly, but frontend testing blocked by rate limiting.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Rate limiter triggering 429 Too Many Requests
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Frontend login fails with 'Too many requests' error
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Wait 15 minutes or restart server to reset LRU cache

integration_issues.issue: Rate limiter preventing login completion in frontend

passed_tests: Login API returns 200 with correct user data
Dev fallback correctly infers school from email (headteacher@school.com)
Subjects API returns 39 subjects for Demo International School
Subjects API returns 36 subjects for Kalambakuwa School
Subject seeding works for schools with 0 subjects
Duplicate subject code handling works (CHI for Chinese and Chichewa)
Authentication flow properly restricts access to admin registration
Registration page correctly redirects unauthenticated users
action_item_for_main_agent: Rate limiter configuration needs adjustment to allow proper testing. The core subjects dropdown issue appears to be resolved - backend APIs are working correctly and returning subjects. Once rate limiting is addressed, subjects should display properly in the teacher registration form.
